briefdescription.para: The optional heading or list nesting level.
Create a selector for the given role.

memberdef.argsstring: (const StyleRole styleRole, const std::optional< int > level, const StyleListKind listKind=StyleListKind::Any) noexcept
memberdef.name: StyleSelector

briefdescription.para: Create a selector with optional level and list-kind qualifiers.

parameterdescription.para: The optional heading or list nesting level.

memberdef.name: StyleSelector

briefdescription.para: Create a selector with required style tokens.

parameterdescription.para: Required style tokens parsed from TextNode::style().

memberdef.name: StyleSelector

briefdescription.para: Create a selector with optional level, list kind, and required style tokens.

parameterdescription.para: The optional heading or list nesting level.
Required style tokens parsed from TextNode::style().

briefdescription.para: Compare two selectors for exact identity.
Get the semantic role to match.
Get the optional heading or list nesting level.
Get the optional list kind qualifier.
Get the required style tokens parsed from TextNode::style().
Get the required style tokens parsed from TextNode::style().
Create a selector for the given semantic role.
Create a heading selector for the given level.

simplesect.para: The selector for that heading level.

simplesect.para: The selector for that list container.

memberdef.name: listItem

simplesect.para: The selector for that list item.

briefdescription.para: Create a span selector with required style tokens.

parameterdescription.para: Required style tokens typically coming from the class attribute.

simplesect.para: The span selector for these required style tokens.

briefdescription.para: A selector used to define or request one style rule.
